title: IShowSpeed Moon
description: Replaces the moon with ishowspeed my mom is kinda homeless moment
body:
🌕 IShowSpeed Moon Resourcepack — *Speed to the Moon Edition*  
Carry chaotic lunar energy—replace Minecraft’s Moon with IShowSpeed’s iconic “My mom is kinda homeless” expression!  
This resourcepack transforms the default Moon texture into a grayscale image of Speed’s puckered face, adding surreal comedy to every night cycle.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces the Moon texture with Speed
🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and shaders  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy meme swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
